pageContext.name: Marty McFly
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Marty McFly! Based on the likeness of Michael J. Fox and the original movie references, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.  Back to the Future fans, don't miss your chance to add Marty McFly to your Back to the Future collection!
